text.div: The patient, identified as Patient/patient1, has two recorded medical conditions. The first condition, recorded on January 21, 2023, is unspecified heart failure. The second condition, recorded on June 14, 2023, is uncomplicated unspecified asthma. The last update on the patient's medical records was on August 23, 2023. As of the current date, August 24, 2023, no further updates have been made.
